response_text:
ENTITY Airport
PK airport_code
ATTR airport_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airport_name : varchar
ATTR location_code : varchar
ATTR city_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY City
PK city_code
ATTR city_code : varchar : PK
ATTR city_name : varchar

ENTITY Airline
PK airline_code
ATTR airline_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_name : varchar

ENTITY Airplane
PK registration_code
ATTR registration_code : varchar : PK
ATTR model_code : varchar
ATTR model_name : varchar

ENTITY Flight
PK flight_code
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK
ATTR airline_code : varchar : FK
ATTR registration_code : varchar : FK
ATTR origin_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR destination_airport_code : varchar : FK
ATTR baggage_belt_code : varchar : FK

ENTITY CrewMember
PK crew_code
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK
ATTR first_name : varchar
ATTR last_name : varchar
ATTR role : varchar

ENTITY CrewAssignment
PK flight_code, crew_code, role
ATTR flight_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR crew_code : varchar : PK : FK
ATTR role : varchar : PK

ENTITY FlightStatus
PK status_id
ATTR status_id : integer : PK
ATTR status_code : varchar
ATTR status_name : varchar

ENTITY FlightStatusLog
PK log_id
ATTR log_id : integer : PK
ATTR flight_code : varchar : FK
ATTR status_id : integer : FK
ATTR status_date : date
ATTR status_time : time

REL Airport -> City : 1 -> 1..N : FK=city_code
REL Flight -> Airline : 1 -> 1 : FK=airline_code
REL Flight -> Airplane : 1 -> 1 : FK=registration_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=origin_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 1 -> 1 : FK=destination_airport_code
REL Flight -> Airport : 0..1 -> 1 : FK=baggage_belt_code
REL CrewAssignment -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL CrewAssignment -> CrewMember : 1..N -> 1 : FK=crew_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> Flight : 1..N -> 1 : FK=flight_code
REL FlightStatusLog -> FlightStatus : 1..N -> 1 : FK=status_id
